scope_resolution: foundation per_minute_features universe confirmed; atlas is a downstream filter applied at analysis time as needed via inner-join on the 14,033 atlas ticker list. Foundation scope (17,979 tickers) is a strict superset of atlas; 3,946 foundation-only tickers preserve edge-case premarket dynamics for upstream analysis.
gate3_resolution: scope ambiguity surfaced by App, resolved by operator to foundation scope (A)
gate5_resolution: prompt size estimate was uncompressed/order-of-magnitude error; 86 MB at 41.8 bytes/row matches per_minute_features compression density (43.6 bytes/row) exactly
